reason: Response B matches the style I typically employ for humor: a crisp, structured setup with a punchy observation that subverts a social norm, delivered with dry wit rather than poetic flourish. Response A reads as overwrought and purple-prosed ("small forgiveness we pour ourselves each fragile, caffeinated morning"), which leans more toward a literary imitation than my natural tendency toward concise, comedic observations. The one-liner format requested also suits B far better, as A is closer to a fragment of prose poetry.
